title: Valley of the Shadow of Death
subtitle: Walking when sight is taken away
intro: Beyond the battle, the road narrows into a valley where the dark presses close enough to breathe.
Here faith is no longer a feeling of brightness. It is one obedient step while the next is still hidden.
The whispers will preach fear as wisdom. Keep to the path; the dawn is not less real because you cannot yet see it.
intro_zh: 光变得稀薄，道路像被黑暗吞没。
这里眼睛帮不上忙，低语却很会假装成真理。
抓住话语的灯，继续走；黎明不因你看不见就消失。
spiritual_theme: Faith without sight, courage under fear, and clinging to the Word
spiritual_theme_zh: 在黑暗中倚靠话语而非眼见
core_mechanic: Your lantern shrinks with fear and grows with faith; resist whispers, read lanterns of the Word, and press through fear-shades toward dawn.
core_mechanic_zh: 在视线受限中跟随灯中话语，拒绝黑暗低语。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch10 死荫谷 + darkness/prayer-path system (Skills 34-35).

seven_beats.arrival: A pitch-black valley mouth straight after Apollyon.
seven_beats.orientation: An extremely narrow path with a ditch on the left and a quag on the right, a glimmer of a white cross ahead.
seven_beats.encounter: Disembodied whispers from the fog: 'you are cast off; no one hears your prayer.'
seven_beats.temptation: Fear and despair, luring you to stop, turn, or stray off the narrow track.
seven_beats.choice: Enter in prayer / rush in confidently / hesitate in fear.
seven_beats.consequence: Praying steadies faith and resolve; rushing breeds pride and loses watchfulness; hesitating feeds fear.
seven_beats.grace: A pulse of prayer lights the next step; dawn breaks after the dark — give thanks.

chapel.verse_zh: 我虽然行过死荫的幽谷，也不怕遭害，因为你与我同在。
chapel.verse_en: Though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me.
chapel.hint_zh: 不要偏左，也不要偏右，用祷告的微光看清下一步。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 你已经被丢弃了，你的祷告没有人听见。

design.stat_arc_note: Not a boss — holding fast in darkness. Straying left/right (the ditch/quag hazards) costs hp + fear/despair.
